productDisplayName: Puma Men Osu NM Grey Casual Shoes
description: Let the modern look of the puma Osu NM help bring you closer to that clean and simple style you've been looking for. Stylish and comfortable, it makes for a great casual wear shoe. Upper Synthetic suede and mesh upper with embroidered logo Bootie construction and hook-and-loop closure for easy wear and removal Lushly padded collar to avoid shoe bite Midsole has an Eco-OrthoLite footbed, an environmentally friendly foam insole that retains its shape over time, offering a consistent Fit Flexible CM-EVA midsole for cushioned comfort Outsole Carbon rubber outsole for durability and grip Deep flex grooves for optimal flexibility Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Use a suede brush to remove dust from suede parts Do not machine wash
